domain_gate.hypothesis: amplitude calibrates to stub difficulty per corpus: both corpora lift more at alpha=0.2 than 0.1 (mean over seeds 42,777) AND narrative-past seed-777 clears 0.2 by >= 0.05 at alpha=0.2 — all same-session (review #15 cross-session concern)
domain_gate.evidence: {"summary": {"H_both_corpora_rise": {"value": 1.0, "threshold": 1.0, "pass": true}, "H_np_s777_margin": {"value": 0.025, "threshold": 0.05, "pass": false}}, "means_per_corpus_alpha": {"narrative_past_A": {"0.1": 0.175, "0.2": 0.325}, "descriptive_scene_B": {"0.1": 0.275, "0.2": 0.55}}, "grid": {"narrative_past_A": {"0.1": {"42": {"lift": 0.25, "dH": 0.0827}, "777": {"lift": 0.1, "dH": 0.0213}}, "0.2": {"42": {"lift": 0.425, "dH": -0.0002}, "777": {"lift": 0.225, "dH": 0.0328}}}, "descriptive_scene_B": {"0.1": {"42": {"lift": 0.3, "dH": 0.2608}, "777": {"lift": 0.25, "dH": 0.1953}}, "0.2": {"42": {"lift": 0.525, "dH": 0.1984}, "777": {"lift": 0.575, "dH": 0.1732}}}}, "narrative_past_s777_at_0.2": 0.225, "finding": "FAIL-ON-MARGIN: the DIRECTION is confirmed with large effect sizes (both_rise=True \u2014 narrative-past 0.175->0.325 nearly doubles; descriptive-scene 0.275->0.55 exactly doubles), but the strict registered margin on narrative-past seed-777 FAILS (margin +0.025 < 0.05 required). Seed-777 at alpha=0.2 matches the L18 cross-session reading exactly (0.225) BUT (review #16 correction) this is NOT independent evidence of a stable floor: e4_cli's per-generation seed is hash(seed|arm|concept|stub) \u2014 it does not depend on alpha or the --loop tag \u2014 so re-dispatching the identical (seed, corpus, alpha) cell is EXPECTED to reproduce bit-for-bit. The two readings are one deterministic computation observed twice, not two independent draws; the earlier 'rules out noise, points to a harder floor' inference is WITHDRAWN. What remains: a single data point (n=1 truly independent seed at this cell) sitting just under the margin, direction unrefuted.
